3207100.name: Foxlore Demo
3207100.description:
Step into the surreal world of Foxlore! Try the Free Demo now and get a glimpse into the adventure of Filo, a cunning fox who stumbles upon a mysterious map leading to an ancient relic of untold power. As Filo unravels the secrets of the relic, he uncovers hidden truths that could change the fate of his world forever.

  • Explore the decaying Rust Belt, full of unique characters and puzzles.
  • Learn the murky truth behind the relic, the old world, and the mysterious force behind them. Every choice shapes your story.
  • Learn Filo's story as he navigates a rich, narrative-driven world.
  • Enjoy intuitive gameplay with creative puzzles and artistic visuals in a surreal setting.
  • Unravel the secrets of the old world and the string of fate that binds Filo to it.
